description_long: This sculpture is a detailed representation of the Statue of Liberty, featuring a robed female figure holding a torch aloft in her right hand and a tablet in her left. The statue stands atop a rectangular pedestal with architectural detailing at the base. The figure wears a crown with seven spikes and has a flowing robe with visible folds and drapery. The torch is intricately modeled, and the tablet is inscribed, though the text is not legible in these images. The surface has a greenish patina, characteristic of oxidized copper, and the overall form is monumental and iconic.
description: A green-patinated, robed female figure holding a torch and tablet, standing on a rectangular pedestal, modeled after the Statue of Liberty.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the statue's face, torch raised in the right hand, and tablet in the left, with full details of the robe and pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the statue, the outstretched torch, and the drapery of the robe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the statue, the crown's spikes, and the folds of the robe, with the pedestal's rear details.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the arm holding the torch extended forward and the side of the robe and pedestal.
attribute_subject_matter: Statue of Liberty, a robed female figure symbolizing liberty
attribute_location_context: No specific context visible; appears isolated on a plain background, typical of digital or catalog presentation.
